creator: gabor@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

As we discussed on IRC, I marked the conflicting port as DEPRECATED 
with one month of expiration time. If nobody fixes that weird port, 
it will be removed and this issue will not come up again. 
For the meantime, users get warned by the DEPRECATED variable, that 
they should not use that port.
